title: Set Of 2 Rubber Snowflake Bone And Ball Squeaker Dog Toy Pet Gift Xmas Vinyl Play Interactive
features: PAW-FECT GIFT: Include all members of your family this Christmas! Don't leave your pet out this year and gift them with a festive themed toy that they will love.

ENGAGING & HEALTHY: This rubber dog bone toy is designed to engage and entertain your pet, encouraging play and exercise. A great chew toy, helping to strengthen the jaw and promoting healthy teeth and gums, reducing the build-up of plaque and tartar.
FESTIVE DESIGN: This pack includes a festive rubber chew bone & ball with snowflakes design in Red, Green or White.
SIZE & QUANTITY: This pack includes 1 rubber bone & 1 rubber ball. Bone measures approximately 17cm, Ball measures approximately 9cm.
MATERIAL: Made from a pet friendly rubber material with a plastic squeaker inside.
